eval_youden_cutoff.note: Fit on pooled OOF scores — slightly optimistic; use primary_cutoff for deployment.

removed_arbitrary_api_bands.reason: Not derived from ROC or clinical scales; replaced by Youden J.

morse_fall_scale.name: Morse Fall Scale (MFS)
morse_fall_scale.citation: Morse JM, Morse RM, Tinzoh J. Development of a scale to identify the fall-prone patient. Can J Aging. 1989;8(4):373-385.
morse_fall_scale.typical_cutoff: Score ≥ 45 indicates high fall risk (inpatient nursing).
morse_fall_scale.relation_to_imu_model: MFS uses clinical observation items; our model uses wearable IMU gait features. Thresholds are not interchangeable without calibration study.

stratify.name: STRATIFY
stratify.citation: Oliver D, Britton M, Seed P, Martin FC, Hopper AH. Development and evaluation of evidence based risk assessment tool (STRATIFY) to predict which elderly inpatients will fall. BMJ. 1997;315(7115):1049-1053.
stratify.relation_to_imu_model: STRATIFY is a brief clinical checklist; IMU-derived risk probability requires a data-driven cutoff (Youden J) on held-out subjects.
